data_setup_failures.description: 37/39 test cases require multi-org user context. Test account Elena Mutykova belongs to exactly one organization ('[E2E Test] Contoso Ltd.'). No org switcher is rendered. B2B test data was not seeded for this run. To execute this suite fully, provision a second organization and add the test user as a member.
data_setup_failures.recommendation: Provision second org membership for test user OR use a dedicated multi-org test account
